title: Taanab Yellow Aces
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Ace}} {{MilitaryUnit |image= |name=Taanab Yellow Aces |type=[[Starfighter/Legends|Starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] |formation= |commander=[[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]] |second= |staff= |subunit= |strength= |vehicles= |headquarters= |location= |battles= |formed= |founded= |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |affiliation=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] *[[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] }} {{Quote|What the Sithspawn are those?''"
"''Twin Suns One, you have the Taanab Yellow Aces, Aces-One speaking. We're here to show the defenders of Borleias what flying is all about.|[[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] and [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]]|''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]''}} The '''Taanab Yellow Aces''' was a volunteer [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]]. Formed and commanded by [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]] of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] fame during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the unit's name was a tribute to the [[Tierfon Yellow Aces/Legends|Tierfon Yellow Aces]] of [[Tierfon/Legends|Tierfon]] and Janson's [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Taanab/Legends|Taanab]]. Janson had served in the Tierfon Yellow Aces with [[Jek Tono Porkins/Legends|Jek Tono Porkins]] during the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. The squadron flew a mix of [[Color/Legends|yellow]] [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptors]] and [[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wing escort starfighters]] that featured distinct angular black striping. During the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|Liberation of Coruscant]], the squadron also included [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighters]]. Following the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]], the Yellow Aces joined with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] massed forces at [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]]. After serving as escorts during the crucial resupply of Borleias, the Yellow Aces worked within the new [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] to free [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] held by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] at [[Selvaris]]. {{Military-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]'' {{1st}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' ==Sources== *{{SWPM|set=Base Set|cardname=Taanab Yellow Aces A-wing|link=http://www.swpocketmodels.com/images/ship09b.jpg}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Gelbe Taanab Asse |es=Aces Amarillos de Taanab }} [[Category:Galactic Alliance starfighter squadrons]] [[Category:New Republic starfighter squadrons]]
